---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to do that mojivs doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What behavior or API would you like? A rough sketch is fine.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context

Relevant IVD collections, fonts, or scripts. Note the existing limitations
listed in the README (e.g. Adobe-Japan1-only IVS, no automatic line breaking).
